name: RPlog_Death_of_the_Dimlyn_Titan_IV
title: The Death of the Dimlyn Titan IV
summary: Guided by a Force vision, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios and her estranged lover and apprentice Orson Tighe pilot the Uwannabuyim to a junkyard system and board the derelict Old Republic flagship Dimlyn Titan IV in search of a mysterious prize. Aboard the dying ship their relationship shatters in a bitter confrontation, and they split up just as the fallen Selas warrior Simon Sezirok arrives, cutting through bulkheads and duelling Orson, who briefly bests him before Simon escapes. Consumed by despair and the Dark Side, Jessalyn recovers a glowing brass key-object and turns on Simon in a savage lightsaber battle, nearly choking him to death until a Force-vision of his possible redemption stays her hand. As explosions tear the Titan apart, the white-haired Jedi Cronos and the girl Mira intervene; Jessalyn ultimately flees aboard Simon's ship Tortured Soul while passing the brass relic to Mira, leaving the gravely wounded Orson devastated. The Dimlyn Titan IV finally breaks in half and dies its second death, its last secret carried away aboard the escaping ships.
